text: Your bank account has been compromised. Please share your OTP immediately to verify your identity.
This is officer from CBI. You are involved in a money laundering case. Do not contact anyone.
Congratulations! You have won a lottery of 10 lakhs. Send 500 rupees processing fee now.
Your SIM card will be blocked within 2 hours. Call us back urgently to prevent this.
Income tax department has issued a warrant for your arrest. Pay penalty or face legal action.
Hello, I am calling from Amazon. There is a suspicious order on your account. Please verify.
Your KYC is incomplete. Share your Aadhaar number and OTP to avoid account suspension.
We are offering you a special discount on our insurance plan. Are you interested in hearing more?
Hi, I wanted to confirm your appointment for tomorrow at 10 AM. Please let me know if that works.
Your package is ready for delivery. Please confirm your address for shipping.
Don't tell anyone about this call. This is a confidential government matter regarding your name.
Transfer the money within the next 30 minutes or your account will be permanently frozen.
This is your last chance to claim your reward. Act now before the offer expires tonight.
We have detected unusual activity on your credit card. Stay on the line for verification.
Your electricity bill is overdue. Pay now or service will be disconnected in 2 hours.
Send gift cards worth $500 to clear your outstanding taxes. This is IRS official calling.
Hello, this is a reminder about your car extended warranty expiration next month.
Narcotics bureau found a package with drugs registered in your name. Legal action will follow immediately.
Please send the OTP received on your phone. It is required for account security verification.
We need to verify your social security number for the government relief fund payment.
Your computer has been hacked. Call us immediately to prevent data loss and identity theft.
This is Microsoft support. We detected a virus on your device. Do not close this call.
Thank you for your recent purchase. Your order will be delivered by Friday. Have a good day.
We are calling to inform you about a new savings account with 8% interest rate for you.
Please do not share this information with your family. This is strictly between us only.
Act right now. Do not hang up this phone. Your arrest warrant has been issued today.
We have a refund for you from the tax department. Just provide your bank account details.
Your subscription has been renewed for $399. To cancel, call us immediately and provide ID.
Hello this is the hospital calling about your appointment scheduled for next week.
Congratulations you have been pre-approved for a personal loan of fifty thousand dollars.
